Tsuro Path Master

Navigate a strategic path-building game where you place tiles to extend your route across a 6x6 grid. Your stone automatically follows the paths created by each tile placement. Survive longer than your opponents by avoiding being forced off the board's edge. Plan ahead, block rivals, and create safe passages to become the last player standing.

Tsuro Path Master

Navigate a strategic path-building game where you place tiles to extend your route across a 6x6 grid. Your stone automatically follows the paths created by each tile placement. Survive longer than your opponents by avoiding being forced off the board's edge. Plan ahead, block rivals, and create safe passages to become the last player standing.

Arrow Keys: Move tile selection cursor on hand display | Space: Rotate selected tile 90 degrees clockwise | Z: Place selected tile on the board (only valid adjacent positions are highlighted) | Enter: Start game | Escape: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart to main menu
